subcodes.first_line: The servant in attendance hath brought a letter from him who was named Haydar before 'Alí, wherein mention was made of thee; thus have We remembered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتاب من سمی بحیدر قبل علی و کان فیه ذکرک ذکرناک
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
